original_text:
### Charts & Infographics
- Clean, easy to scan, consistent with the system. Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.
- **Color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only.** Placebo/comparator: neutral gray.
- Bars and chart icons: **rounded, approachable** shapes (rounded bar tops).
- Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), **ALL CAPS**, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.
- Statistical callouts: **large and bold** (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a **lighter weight beneath**.
- Footnotes: noticeably smaller, clearly separated from primary data.

quotes: Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.
Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.

rules.intent: Ensure visual consistency for data-heavy sections with consistent brand panel framing.
rules.rule_text: Chart and infographic containers must use uniform rounded corners (radius.infographic.panel = 12px), consisting of a Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel and a Brand Blue (#00529b) rounded header bar.

effect.reserved_for: emphasis on key figures/data points only
effect.subject: color.primary.sunshine, color.primary.gold

quotes: Color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only.
Color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only.

rules.intent: Maintain information hierarchy in data representation, limiting highlight colors to true focal points.
rules.rule_text: In charts, Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) are the dominant elements. Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) must be strictly reserved for emphasis on key figures or specific data points. Placebo or comparator elements must use a neutral gray.

quotes: Bars and chart icons: rounded, approachable shapes (rounded bar tops).

rules.intent: Align data visualizations with the friendly, rounded brand aesthetic.
rules.rule_text: Bars and chart icons must feature rounded, approachable shapes, specifically using rounded tops for chart bars.

quotes: Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), ALL CAPS, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.
Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), ALL CAPS, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.

rules.intent: Standardize chart section title styling for high scanning visibility.
rules.rule_text: In digital assets, chart headlines must use Nunito Sans Bold+ (weight.nunito_sans.800 = 800), ALL CAPS, rendered in Brand Blue (#00529b) with a thin Gold (#ffc60a) rule underneath.

quotes: Statistical callouts: large and bold (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a lighter weight beneath.
Statistical callouts: large and bold (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a lighter weight beneath.

rules.intent: Ensure readability and logical visual flow of high-impact medical data.
rules.rule_text: Statistical callout elements in charts must treat the numeric or percent figure as the hero (large and bold), with any supporting commentary stacked vertically beneath in a lighter font weight.

quotes: Footnotes: noticeably smaller, clearly separated from primary data.
Footnotes: noticeably smaller, clearly separated from primary data.

rules.intent: Maintain hierarchy and separate analytical findings from necessary legal citations or methodology details.
rules.rule_text: Chart footnotes must utilize the smaller footnote text specification (type_scale.footnote) and be clearly, physically separated from the primary clinical data points.
